nl_query: Show all approved revaluation requests where the resulting evaluation attempt was created but the evaluator has not started marking within 3 working days of the attempt assignment.
failed_sql: SELECT rr.id AS request_id, rr.script_id, rr.approved_at, ea.id AS attempt_id, ea.status, ea.evaluator_user_id, au.display_name AS evaluator FROM revaluation_request rr JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.id = rr.resulting_attempt_id JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.id = ea.assignment_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = sa.faculty_cache_id JOIN app_user au ON au.id = fc.evaluator_user_id WHERE rr.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND ea.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND ea.is_active = TRUE AND ea.created_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - working_day_offset(ea.script_assignment.cal_date, 3, ea.script_assignment.academic_year)
